description: AiSpec(spec card) emitting task.completed at the kernel write entry is ALLOWED today
note: Characterization surprise: the in-tx role gate has no rule denying task.completed to AiSpec — sections 2/2.5 don't list it and section 3 only inspects AiCodex/AiClaude actors. The 'spec must not report task completion' rule lives ONLY in the MCP soft gate (mcp_server/tools/emit.rs task_complete -> require_role(Worker)). Pinned as allow; tightening the kernel gate is a conscious FROZEN-VECTOR-CHANGE.

description: AiCodex(report card) emitting task.completed into ANOTHER card's scope is ALLOWED today
note: Characterization surprise: the ReportCard arm of the gate (role_gate.rs section 3, Some(CardRole::ReportCard) => {}) performs NO self-scope cross-check, unlike the Worker arm — a report-card-bound actor can write into any card/wave/cove scope as long as the event isn't wave.updated or a dispatch-request. Pinned as allow; closing this is a conscious FROZEN-VECTOR-CHANGE.

description: AiCodex(report card) emitting a Wave-scoped task.completed is ALLOWED today
note: Same ReportCard no-scope-check surprise as the previous vector, one scope level up.

description: AiCodex(report card) is still refused wave.updated — the wave-authority branch fires before the ReportCard arm
AiCodex(report card) is still refused codex.worker_requested — the dispatch-authority branch fires before the ReportCard arm
